'''Chackra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jeodu]] who served as a member of [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]], a personal [[Bodyguard/Legends|guard]] for [[Dequc]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].<ref name="Mara Jade 6">[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 6]]</ref>
